archetype: Archetype 5 (Jewel & Luxury) - Adapted for High-End Aviation/Automotive (Dark Graphite, Metallic, Minimal Red)
design_vision: Premium, Sharp, Confident, Clean. The interface should feel like configuring a high-end exotic car or booking a private jet. Dark luxury interface with glassmorphism, sharp section breaks, and minimal red accents. Cinematic, high-contrast presentation.

rules.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-7xl font-black tracking-tighter uppercase
rules.h2: text-3xl sm:text-4xl lg:text-5xl font-bold tracking-tight uppercase

layout_and_spacing.spacing_scale: Generous. Use py-24 or py-32 for major sections. Gap-8 to Gap-12 for bento grids.

components.navigation: Sticky header (z-50) using 'surfaces.glass'. Logo on left, nav links center, 'Book Now' CTA right. Text size text-sm font-medium.
components.hero: Cinematic full height (min-h-[90vh]). Background image with bg-black/60 overlay for text contrast. Large h1 aligned center or left. Primary CTA: Solid White bg, black text. Secondary CTA: Glass outline. Include scroll indicator.
components.trust_bar: Horizontal bar below hero with icons for Aircraft, Watercraft, Automotive. Minimalist.
components.services_section: 3 large bento cards. Automotive is fully active. Aero and Marine must be full cards but covered by a backdrop-blur overlay, lock icon, 'Coming Soon' badge, and an inline 'Notify Me' email input + button.
components.pricing_table: 4 tiers: Essential Wash ($60), Interior Refresh ($95), Society Signature ($160), Black Label ($220-$250). Black Label should use 'Tracing Beam' effect or a metallic border glow to stand out. Feature list with check icons. 'Book' CTA on each.
components.booking_wizard: Multi-step flow taking up a dedicated section or modal. Steps: 1) Category -> 2) Vehicle Size -> 3) Package -> 4) Add-ons -> 5) Date/Time -> 6) Contact Info. Step indicators at top. Smooth slide transitions.
components.gallery: Bento grid of high-quality macro/cinematic detailing shots. Filterable tabs (All, Auto, Aero, Marine).
components.why_choose_us: Dark minimalist grid. Icons (lucide-react), sharp typography.
components.process: 3-4 steps. Clean layout, perhaps horizontal with connecting subtle lines.
components.faq: Shadcn Accordion component. Minimal borders, flush layout, metallic hover state.
components.footer: Large padding (py-24). Include 'Aero Exotic' large typography, Instagram link (https://www.instagram.com/aeroexotic), Service Area (Spokane, WA), and bottom copyright line.

hero_background.alt: Elegant black sports car dark background cinematic

motion_and_interaction.hover: Interactive elements scale (1.02) and borders brighten to border-white/30.
motion_and_interaction.entrance: Staggered fade-up (opacity 0 to 1, y: 20px to 0) for lists and grids.

accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Text over images must have bg-black/50 or bg-gradient-to-t to ensure legibility.
accessibility_and_testing.testing_attributes: Add 'data-testid' to ALL buttons, inputs, tabs, and wizard steps (e.g., data-testid='pricing-tier-black-label-btn').

instructions_to_main_agent: DO NOT use generic UI libraries or default Vercel/Stripe looks. Keep it strictly Dark, Metallic, and Cinematic.
Build the multi-step booking wizard using Shadcn Form and React hooks to manage step state.
For the 'Coming Soon' Aero/Marine service cards, render the beautiful background image, but overlay a glass pane with a lock icon, 'Coming Soon' text, and a 'Notify Me' email input field.
Import 'Outfit' and 'Manrope' fonts from Google Fonts in index.css and map them in tailwind.config.js.
Use lucide-react for all standard icons, keeping stroke width crisp (1.5).
Never use placeholder image URLs. Rely exclusively on the URLs provided in the 'media' section of this JSON.
The primary red accent should be used very sparingly (e.g., a single line under the active step, or a tiny badge), not as massive backgrounds.
